description: LLM imports pgTable/integer/text from 'drizzle-orm' but they're exported from 'drizzle-orm/pg-core'. Three TS2305 errors. eq() is correctly at the root. Probe-result: TBD on first run — if the LSP auto-import code-action recognizes the symbols are available in /pg-core (the stub declares them), it might suggest the right import. Update mustPass / errorsAfterMax once we see the actual behavior.
